    if n = 0 then (constantCoeff φ)⁻¹

source_declaration.name: PowerSeries.coeff_inv
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem coeff_inv (n) (φ : k⟦X⟧) :
    coeff n φ⁻¹ =
      if n = 0 then (constantCoeff φ)⁻¹
      else
        -(constantCoeff φ)⁻¹ *
          ∑ x ∈ antidiagonal n,
            if x.2 < n then coeff x.1 φ * coeff x.2 φ⁻¹ else 0 := by
  rw [inv_eq_inv_aux, coeff_inv_aux n (constantCoeff φ)⁻¹ φ]

@[simp]

hydrated_mathlib_context.why_needed: to express coefficients of inverses in terms of coefficients of the original series, enabling a proof that coefficient equality up to n implies coefficient equality of inverses up to n

messages.data: Nat.add_choose_eq (m n k : ℕ) : (m + n).choose k = ∑ ij ∈ antidiagonal k, m.choose ij.1 * n.choose ij.2

lean_check.signature: Nat.add_choose_eq (m n k : ℕ) : (m + n).choose k = ∑ ij ∈ antidiagonal k, m.choose ij.1 * n.choose ij.2

source_declaration.name: Nat.add_choose_eq
source_declaration.source_snippet:
/-- Vandermonde's identity -/
theorem add_choose_eq (m n k : ℕ) :
    (m + n).choose k = ∑ ij ∈ antidiagonal k, m.choose ij.1 * n.choose ij.2 := by
  calc
    (m + n).choose k = ((X + 1) ^ (m + n)).coeff k := by rw [coeff_X_add_one_pow, cast_id]
    _ = ((X + 1) ^ m * (X + 1) ^ n).coeff k := by rw [pow_add]
    _ = ∑ ij ∈ antidiagonal k, m.choose ij.1 * n.choose ij.2 := by
      rw [coeff_mul, Finset.sum_congr rfl]
      simp only [coeff_X_add_one_pow, cast_id, imp_true_iff]

/-- The sum of entries squared in a row of Pascal's triangle -/

hydrated_mathlib_context.why_needed: Vandermonde identity; already checked and used in the failed attempt

source_declaration.name: Finset.card_image_le
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem card_image_le [DecidableEq β] : #(s.image f) ≤ #s := by
  simpa only [card_map] using (s.1.map f).toFinset_card_le

grind_pattern card_image_le => #(s.image f)
grind_pattern card_image_le => s.image f, #s

messages.data:
PowerSeries.coeff_inv.{u_2} {k : Type u_2} [Field k] (n : ℕ) (φ : k⟦X⟧) :
  (coeff n) φ⁻¹ =
    if n = 0 then (constantCoeff φ)⁻¹
    else -(constantCoeff φ)⁻¹ * ∑ x ∈ antidiagonal n, if x.2 < n then (coeff x.1) φ * (coeff x.2) φ⁻¹ else 0
